content: sysctlvalue  Table of contents Prototype: sysctlvalue(key) Return type: string Description: Returns the sysctl value of key using /proc/sys . Arguments: key : string - sysctl key - in the range: .* Example: code vars : " tested " slist => { "net.ipv4.tcp_mem" , "net.unix.max_dgram_qlen" }; " values[$(tested)] " string => sysctlvalue ( $ ( tested )); Output: code "values[net.ipv4.tcp_mem]" = "383133\t510845\t766266" "values[net.unix.max_dgram_qlen]" = "512" Notes: History: Was introduced in version 3.11.0 (2017) See also: data_sysctlvalues()
title: sysctlvalue
